coding.display: Migraine, unspecified, not intractable, without status migrainosus

note.text: Chronic migraine diagnosis confirmed. Patient reports ≥15 headache days per month for >3 months. Meets ICHD-3 criteria for chronic migraine. Failed topiramate and propranolol.

code.text: Monthly headache diary — headache days per month

note.text: January 2024: 18 headache days. Mean headache duration 5.2 hours. Severe pain (NRS ≥7) on 12 days. Functional impairment on 15 days.

code.text: Monthly headache diary — headache days per month

note.text: February 2024: 22 headache days (worst month). Mean duration 6.1 hours. 18 days with NRS ≥7. Patient reports significant impact on work performance.

code.text: Monthly headache diary — headache days per month

note.text: March 2024: 19 headache days while on topiramate 100mg. Baseline was 22 days — insufficient response (reduction <50%). Mean duration 5.8 hours.

Trial duration 4 months. Insufficient response: headache days reduced from 22 to 19/month (14% reduction; clinically meaningful threshold is ≥50%). Patient tolerated medication without cognitive side effects.
Trial discontinued after 6 weeks due to bradycardia (resting HR 48 bpm). Headache frequency did not improve during the trial period.

resource.conclusion: Patient Aaliyah Johnson presents with chronic migraine (≥15 headache days/month for >6 months), refractory to two prior preventive agents (topiramate 100mg × 4 months; propranolol 80mg × 6 weeks, discontinued for bradycardia). Documentation supports ICHD-3 criteria for chronic migraine. Patient is an appropriate candidate for onabotulinumtoxinA (Botox) 155 units per the PREEMPT injection protocol. Recommended dosing: 155–200 units every 12 weeks across 31–39 injection sites. No contraindications identified.

code.text: CGRP antibody trial — erenumab (Aimovig) 70mg monthly injection

note.text: 3-month trial of erenumab 70mg SC monthly. Insufficient response: headache days 22→19/month (13% reduction). Patient reported no tolerability issues. Trial count now includes: topiramate (failed), propranolol (discontinued, side effects), erenumab (failed).
